title: Confluence: Otherworld Gun Fix
description: Adds 3rd person animations to Confluence: Otherworld (TerrariaCraft) guns and allows aiming them down sights.
body:
This mod simply gives the Terraria Guns added by **Confluence: Otherworld** a _3rd person aiming animation_. You can disable recoil, use vanilla bow animation, and re-enable bobbing animations in the config.

Affects:

Ranged Weapons:

-All of the guns

-Blowpipe

Magic Weapons:

-Bee Gun

-Space Gun

![Star cannon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/683027844fd1aec3e644276db38a8500a603fefc_0.webp)
